notes: PRIMARY BIKE CARB — all brackets. 80g/serving in 500ml water. 2:1 glucose:fructose hydrogel. 1 bottle = 1 hour of bike base carbs. DM320 in use = no other drink mix in same hour. Never count this bottle as plain water — athlete needs a separate plain water bottle.

ROOKIE BIKE CARB. 40g/serving in 500ml. Use when athlete bracket is Rookie (45-60g/hr target). Can pair 1 DM160 + 1 Gel 100 per hour to reach 65g/hr without stacking overage. Same hydrogel format as DM320.

BIKE SUPPLEMENT + RUN GEL. 25g carbs. On bike: supplements DM320 for Experienced/Sub-10 athletes. On run: use every 20-30min as primary run gel when SiS Beta Fuel not prescribed. Gut-gentle hydrogel — lowest GI risk of all gels.

STRATEGIC CAFFEINE — 1 per race only. 100mg caffeine. Timing: mid-run (km 10-15 for 70.3; km 25-30 for Full IM). NEVER on bike. Combined with Euphoria pre-race = 200mg total (ISSN 2021 ceiling). Count toward daily caffeine ceiling.

EARLY BIKE SOLID — optional. 40g carbs. Solid food window: first 60-90min of bike only. SWAP RULE: replaces 1x Gel 100 in that 30min window — do not stack additive on DM320. Never on run. Box of 12 price approx $39 — verify on TheFeed before ordering.

PRIMARY RUN GEL. 40g carbs + 200mg sodium per gel. MTC 1:0.8 ratio — required above 60g/hr. Covers carbs AND electrolytes in one product on run. Every 20-30min on run. Full IM needs 6-8 gels. Supplement with FastChews every 30min for full sodium target.

ELECTROLYTE BACKBONE — all legs. Buccal absorption under tongue — no water required. 100mg Na + 30mg K + 10mg Ca + 6mg Mg per 2-chew serving. Every 30min all bike and run. Hot/extreme conditions: every 20min. Start at gun — not when symptoms appear. 1 bottle = 30 servings = enough for most race days plus training.
